steps.title: Identify the vertex form
steps.content: The model is written in vertex form, so the value inside the squared term identifies the input at the vertex.
steps.formula: $$\text{Vertex form: } y = a(x - h)^2 + k \text{ has vertex at } x = h$$

steps.title: Use the maximum point
steps.content: Because the coefficient of the squared term is negative, the parabola opens downward, so its vertex gives the greatest airflow. The angle at the vertex is $31$ degrees. The answer is C.
